name: Fruity Golden Waffles
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chopped dates (or raisins or honey)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the oats, whole-wheat flour, chopped dates (raisins), and salt in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add water, stirring until you achieve a smooth batter.
3. Pour the batter into a blender or food processor and blend until smooth.
4. Cook the batter in a waffle iron set to high for 8-10 minutes.
- Ensure the consistency is smooth before pouring it into the waffle iron.
